slides.title: The Nature of Information Density
slides.content: In this program, we process 60MB of structural logic. Each minute (1,000 hours total) represents 1KB of engineering pattern transmission.

slides.title: Anatomy of the Universal Polyglot CMS
slides.content: The architecture is split across repo-php (Legacy/CMS Core) and modern modular stacks (Go, Rust, Python). Understanding the 'Glue' is your objective.
